<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Get current left panel objects
nodes = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
print("Current left panel objects:")
for node in nodes:
    if node['color'] not in ('B', 'W', 'G', 'c'):
        boundary = node['boundary']
        min_row = min(p[0] for p in boundary)
        max_row = max(p[0] for p in boundary)
        min_col = min(p[1] for p in boundary)
        max_col = max(p[1] for p in boundary)
        print(f"  Color={node['color']}, rows={min_row}-{max_row}, cols={min_col}-{max_col}, pixels={node['pixels']}")

# Check green dot position
for node in nodes:
    if node['color'] == 'N':
        min_row = min(p[0] for p in node['boundary'])
        min_col = min(p[1] for p in node['boundary'])
        print(f"\nGreen dot: top-left=({min_row}, {min_col}), offset=({min_row - 38}, {min_col - 8})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
